navigation.archive_path: seed → 'Issues' link in nav → https://cardozoaelj.com/issues/archive/ lists all volumes → current volume page (e.g., /issues/current-issue-volume-44/) lists articles
navigation.notes: Site uses WordPress with Elementor. The archive page lists all volumes, each volume redirects to a current issue page that lists articles. Each article appears as a header.eael-entry-header within a content container. PDF links are direct .pdf URLs associated with each article, typically found as <a href="...pdf">. The site supports pagination via /page/N/ but current issue pages list all article items. No separate online‑only archive; all articles are part of the volume issue pages.
